steps.t: You should ask Lady Galadriel in the Court of Lothlórien for Arwen's gift.
Gift in hand, it is time to visit Arwen in Imlad Gelair in Rivendell, once more.
Arwen has asked you to walk with her in Imlad Gelair in Rivendell. If you get separated, ring the bell. Go with Arwen to the bridge ahead.

Arwen has asked you to walk with her in Imlad Gelair in Rivendell. If you get separated, ring the bell. Go with Arwen onto the second bridge.
